name: online-debate-platform
description: Monorepo for the Online Debate and Presentation Platform with backend and frontend components.

scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && node --check server.js config/db.js controllers/*.js middleware/*.js routes/*.js
scripts.lint:frontend: cd "Front End" && node --check js/login.js js/signup.js js/forgot-password.js js/dashboard.js js/create-debate.js js/join-debate.js js/profile.js js/library.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
